product.description:
• Make your shopping for everyday essentials
easy and affordable with SmartChoice
• The smart and easy choice.

metaData.Key Information:
• Kills germs
• Removes tough stains
• Brightens white clothes
metaData.Preparation:
Directions: For white clothes only. Not to be used on coloured clothes.

Machine wash:
Add SmartChoice bleach with laundry detergent before adding clothes. Use 100ml for small load, 150ml for medium and heavy load. Hand wash:
Add 40ml SmartChoice bleach with laundry detergent in 10 litres water and wash as normal.

Stains removal:
Apply diluted SmartChoice Bleach onto stain. Rub gently and wash promptly. Pour additional bleach with laundry detergent as usual. DO NOT ALLOW PRODUCT TO DRY ON FABRIC. Rinse after 5 minutes and hang to dry.

Toilet bowl:
Wash the toilet bowl as per normal. Flush and pour in 100ml of SmartChoice bleach into toilet bowl. Let it stand for 10 minutes and flush again.

Floor:
Add 100ml of SmartChoice bleach in every 4 litres of water. Mop or scrub.
For disinfection:
Dilute 1 part of SmartChoice bleach to 5 parts of water for wipe down or mopping.
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool dry place , away from direct heat and sunlight.

product.name: Smartchoice Bleach

metaData.Key Information:
Detergent alone is not enough to remove tough stains. Vanish Liquid Crystal White can remove tough stains which need extra attention while being gentle on clothes, both coloured and whites.
• Vanish Liquid non- chlorine formula is safe for whites and fabrics such as wool, silk and other delicate garments.
• For delicate fabrics, test on an inconspicuous area first.
• It gives amazing stain removal first time every time.

product.description:
Nothing Disinfect and Cleans Better than Clorox
Kills 99.9% of germs
Whitening and smoothen your clothes

metaData.Key Information: Kills 99.9% of germ, cleans, disinfects and whitens.
metaData.Preparation:
• Hard, Nonporous Surfaces:
1. Pre-wash surface
2. Mop or wipe with disinfecting solution of 1 cup (250ml) Clorox® Bleach per 5L of water
3. Allow solution to contact surface for at least 10 minutes
For Laundry Use:
1. Add detergent
2. Fill bleach to max line in dispenser or add 1 cup (250ml) for top loading machines or 1/2 cup (125ml) for front loading machines to wash water
3. Add white clothes and start wash
4. Ensure contact with bleach for 10 minutes

product.name: Clorox Bleach - Lemon

metaData.Ingredients: Sodium Carbonate Peroxyhydrate, Oxygen Based Bleaching Agent (30%), Anionic Surfactants (5%), Non-Ionic Surfactants, Enzymes (Proteases)
metaData.Key Information:
Detergent alone is not enough to remove tough stains. Vanish Powder Crystal White has oxi powerlift action to remove tough stains which need extra attention while bring gentle on clothes, both coloured and whites.
• Vanish can be used for in wash and for soaking. For tough stains, fully dissolve 1 scoop in 4L of warm water ( max 40 degree celcius) and soak for up to 6 hours for white clothes and 1 hour for coloured clothes. After soaking, wash as per usual.
• It gives amazing stain removal first time every time and keep whites white.
• For best results on tough stains, rub before rinsing.
metaData.Preparation:
Note:
• Always follow washing instructions on garment or fabric care label
metaData.SAP Product Name: VANISH POWER O2 INTELLIGENCE STAIN REMOVER POWDER - WHITE 1.5KG
metaData.Storage Information:
• Replace lid after each use
• Keep in a cool dry place

• To clean, disinfect and whiten.
metaData.Preparation:
• Cleaning Purposes:
Mop or wipe with 250ml of disinfecting solution of Clorox Bleach per 5L of water.
Allow solution to contact surface for at least 10 minutes.
• Laundry Use:
1. Add detergent.
2. Fill bleach to max line in dispenser.
3. Alternatively, add 1 cup (250ml) for top loading machines or 1/2 cup (125ml) for front loading machines to wash water.
4. Add white clothes and start wash.
5. Ensure contact with bleach for 10 minutes.
